text: This is a unit linked insurance plan. The investment risk is borne by the policyholder. No withdrawals are allowed for the first 5 years.
The insurer will deduct depreciation based on vehicle age. Claims are subject to multiple exclusions including wear and tear.
Pre-existing diseases are not covered for 3 years. Room rent is capped and certain treatments are excluded.
The policy excludes pandemics and limits baggage loss claims. Claims must be filed within 7 days.
In case of suicide within 12 months, only premium paid will be returned. Claims require complete documentation.
Coverage includes hospitalization with some exclusions. Waiting period of 1 year applies for certain illnesses.
The policy covers damages with standard depreciation rules. Minor exclusions apply.
Benefits are subject to internal guidelines and interpretation by the insurer.
The policy covers most medical expenses with minimal exclusions and clear terms.
Comprehensive coverage with few exclusions and flexible claim process.
Provides fixed life cover with straightforward conditions and no major exclusions.
Claims may be approved subject to company discretion and undefined criteria.
This policy contains multiple sections with varied exclusions, conditions, and financial clauses affecting claims.
The policy provides full coverage with no major exclusions or restrictions.
The policy states claims are covered but also mentions that claims may be denied under similar conditions.
